modalImage.alternateText: The Masque Of The Red Death (1964)

metadata.synopsis: Death and debauchery reign in the castle of Price Prospero (Vincent Price)...and when it reigns it pours...in this lavish Edgar Allan Poe adaptation.
metadata.title: The Masque Of The Red Death (1964)

metadata.synopsis: Vincent Price's deceased first wife, Ligeia, casts a long shadow over his ill-advised second marriage, especially when Ligeia’s spirit returns.
metadata.title: The Tomb Of Ligeia

metadata.synopsis: After a series of brutal murders on Texas country roads, police are on the hunt for "the Phantom Killer." Based on one of America's most baffling murder cases, this horrifying suspense thriller is a shocking experience you'll never forget.
metadata.title: The Town That Dreaded Sundown

metadata.synopsis: 65 years after a serial killer terrorized the town of Texarkana, the so-called 'moonlight murders' begin again. Is it a copycat or something even more sinister? A lonely high school girl, with dark secrets of her own, may be the key to catching him.
metadata.title: The Town That Dreaded Sundown (2014)

metadata.synopsis: Five years after the massacre at Camp Arawak, Angela is now working at Camp Rolling Hills. She's still crazy...for camping and good clean fun, that is. But Angela draws the line at bad behavior and she's going to teach some naughty campers a lesson!
metadata.title: Sleepaway Camp II: Unhappy Campers

metadata.synopsis: Under inept new management, Camp Rolling Hills is now Camp New Horizons and it's the ideal setting for a notorious psychopath like Angela Baker to do what she does best, eliminating "immoral" teenagers with everything from a knife to a lawnmower.

metadata.synopsis: The story focuses on Carlos, a former fighter from the Malvinas (Faulkland islands). Carlos lives in a large city square, under a gazebo that he found in the neighborhood. He tragically lost his family in the War. Times were not kind to Carlos. While looking to reunite with his son, he sweeps sidewalks in exchange for tips to help him survive winter nights which have a punishing effect on Carlo's health. Preparing for the coldest night of the year, driven by the impulse to make it, Carlos packs few belongings to seek refuge in a municipal locality. However, the luck again avoids him. An incident at the door of the shelter leaves Carlos unfairly outside. Completely unprotected, away from his usual spot, without shelter and weak health. The coldest night of the year is looming, and Carlos must face endless adversities in an uneven fight against two cruel enemies: loneliness and cold. Thus begins the coldest night only fueled by the desire to survive.
metadata.title: La noche más fría
